audit_items.proof_trace: All four callers of rewrite_session_init() either (a) explicitly store the return value and NULL-check it before use (session.c:215-218 in rewrite_session_var_set_f), or (b) intentionally discard it via a (void) cast or by not storing it at all (conn.c:668, rwm.c:405, rewrite.c:60), making null dereference structurally impossible at those sites. No caller stores a potentially-NULL return value and then dereferences it without a guard.
